backend/main.mo: Main actor for the FinFit backend defining data types (UserProfile, Workout, DailyMetrics, Transaction, MealLog) and CRUD/query functions with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization. Applies migration logic on startup and manages per-principal data maps.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades stored fitness data by adding a `duration` field (defaulting to 0) to all existing Workout records that lacked it.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to their relevant source files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels for build/QA tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark mode CSS custom property tokens (colors, radius, chart palette, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that conditionally renders a loading spinner, AuthScreen, or Dashboard based on authentication state, and shows ProfileSetupModal on first login when no profile exists.
frontend/src/components/CurrencySelector: Dropdown component that lets the user pick a preferred currency and persists the selection to their backend profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/DailyMetricsForm: Form component for logging daily calorie intake and step count, with support for pre-filling steps from the StepTrackerWidget and converting the steps value to BigInt before submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/components/FinanceAISuggest: Generates and displays personalized financial suggestions based on transactions, income, and profession using the 50/30/20 rule. Renders categorized tips (good/warn/info) with relevant icons.
Renders a monthly calendar view of financial transactions, allowing navigation between months and clicking a day to see its transactions. Color-coded dots indicate transaction categories per day.
frontend/src/components/FinanceProfileFo: Form component for saving a user's monthly income and profession to their finance profile. Uses the useUpdateFinanceProfile mutation and shows toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/FitnessAISuggest: Generates and displays personalized fitness suggestions based on user profile, workouts, daily metrics, and meal calories, including BMI analysis, calorie targets, and goal-weight progress. Renders tips categorized as good/warn/info with relevant icons.
Renders a monthly calendar highlighting days with workouts or daily metrics entries, with navigation between months and a detail view for a selected date. Workout and metric days are indicated by colored dots.
frontend/src/components/FitnessProfileFo: Form component for saving a user's body weight, height, and goal weight to their fitness profile. Uses the useUpdateFitnessProfile mutation and validates that all inputs are positive numbers before saving.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a footer with copyright year, app branding, and a referral link to caffeine.ai using the current hostname as the app ID.
frontend/src/components/GoalSelector.tsx: A toggle UI component that lets users switch between 'Cut' and 'Bulk' fitness goals, saving the selection optimistically via the user profile mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/MealList.tsx: Displays a list of meal log entries filtered by date, showing meal name, portion size, and calories, plus a daily calorie total row.
frontend/src/components/MealLogForm.tsx: A form for logging meals that uses a local food database and heuristic calorie estimation to auto-calculate calories from meal name and portion size before submitting.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: An onboarding modal dialog that collects the user's fitness goal, preferred currency, and optional finance/fitness fields (income, profession, weight, height) to initialize their profile.
frontend/src/components/StepTrackerWidge: A widget that interfaces with the device motion sensor via a custom hook to track steps in real time, handling permission states (unsupported, denied, prompt, granted) with appropriate UI for each.
Renders a sorted list of financial transactions with category-specific icons and colors, displaying description, category label, date, and amount.
frontend/src/components/TransactionLogFo: A form for adding a new financial transaction with fields for description, amount, category (needs/saving/investment/other), and date, submitting via the logTransaction mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutLogForm.t: A form component for logging workouts that collects muscle group, exercise, sets, reps, weight, and duration, with a live AI-based calorie burn preview and submission via the useLogWorkout mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, workouts, daily metrics, meal logs, and transactions via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useStepTracker.ts: A hook that tracks step count using the DeviceMotion API with peak detection on acceleration magnitude, handling iOS permission requests and providing start/stop/reset controls.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the FinFit theme including fitness and finance accent colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AuthScreen.tsx: Renders the authentication screen with a hero section showcasing FinFit features and a login/sign-up panel that uses Internet Identity for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard layout with a sticky header, bottom navigation, and conditional rendering of FitnessSection or FinanceSection based on the active tab.
frontend/src/pages/FinanceSection.tsx: Finance tracking page displaying quick stats (total spend, savings, investments), a transaction log dialog, and tabbed views for list, calendar, and AI suggestions.
frontend/src/pages/FitnessSection.tsx: Fitness tracking page showing workout/step/calorie stats, dialogs for logging workouts, meals, and daily metrics, plus tabbed views for calendar, meals, and AI suggestions.
frontend/src/utils/calorieCalculator.ts: MET-based calorie burn estimator that maps exercise names and muscle groups to MET values and calculates calories burned from workout duration and body weight.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting, persisting, and cleaning URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH variables, fonts, border radii, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for FitTrack AI describing existing features (workout duration logging, AI calorie burn estimation, step tracking, stats summary) and pending new feature requests for AI calorie tracking and step count via device permissions.
